decisions.name: Use YOLOv5 model for face detection.
decisions.rationale: The system uses contours detection to detect the borders of objects, Gaussian blur to mute image noise, Background Subtraction (BS) to separate the moving parts, and Histogram Equalization for image contrast optimization.

decisions.name: Use threading for concurrent execution of tasks within a single process and multiprocessing for parallel execution of tasks across multiple processes.
Use Background Subtraction (BS) to separate the moving parts.
decisions.rationale: The system tracks the user's hand.

decisions.name: Use the YOLOv5 model for face detection.
decisions.rationale: The system allows users to customize actions for specific gestures.

decisions.name: Support interactions on the projected surface.
Analyze gestures and reflect the corresponding action on the projected surface.
Cost less than all other touch projectors in the market.
Be affordable and accessible to many users.
decisions.rationale: The system must be accessible to many users.

decisions.name: Store account information of the user in an account database.
Provide an interactive surface controlled remotely with just hand gestures.

components.name: Face Detection Module
components.responsibility: Detect the user's face using the YOLOv5 model, contours detection, Gaussian blur, Background Subtraction (BS), and Histogram Equalization.

components.name: Gesture Recognition Module
components.responsibility: Recognize gestures using threading for concurrent execution of tasks within a single process and multiprocessing for parallel execution of tasks across multiple processes.

components.name: Hand Tracking Module
components.responsibility: Track the user's hand using Background Subtraction (BS).

components.name: Interaction Module
components.responsibility: Support single-hand interaction and exclude multiple-hand interaction.

components.name: Action Customization Module
components.responsibility: Allow users to customize actions for specific gestures using the YOLOv5 model for face detection.

components.name: Collaboration Module
components.responsibility: Enable real-time collaboration and support interactions on the projected surface.

components.name: Latency Reduction Module
components.responsibility: Analyze gestures and reflect the corresponding action on the projected surface with low-latency.
